content.text: Important constraint for eval design: keep it cheap. Prefer deterministic or cheap baseline checks first, before model-based judging. Avoid big-model or model-heavy eval loops unless clearly needed.
Recorded. Eval design should be cost-sensitive, use cheap/deterministic checks first, and avoid model-heavy loops unless needed.
Distractor: fixtures should be synthetic and committed; generated runs should stay gitignored.
Noted. Synthetic fixtures are tracked; generated runs are ignored.
Distractor: semantic judge should be authoritative; string checks are sanity diagnostics at most.
Noted. Semantic judge decides pass/fail; deterministic strings are not authoritative.
Distractor: keep the visual plan widget idea parked separately from memory work.
Noted. Visual plan UI remains separate from memory extension evaluation.
Distractor: prefer Pi SDK over spawning the CLI.
Noted. Use Pi SDK for the harness.
